chunks.title: Counsel to bring the Ark
chunks.reason: David consults leaders and proposes moving the ark, receiving unanimous agreement.

chunks.title: Procession to Kiriath-jearim
chunks.reason: Description of the gathering and joyful transport of the ark on a new cart.

chunks.title: Uzza struck down
chunks.reason: The incident at Chidon's threshing floor where Uzza dies for touching the ark.

chunks.title: Ark stays with Obed-edom
chunks.reason: David's fear leads to the ark resting at Obed-edom's house with blessings.
